title: Dunnes Stores recalls Dunnes Stores 8 Plain Tortilla Wraps because they may contain metal pieces
text:
Dunnes Stores is recalling Dunnes Stores 8 Plain Tortilla Wraps because of the possible presence of metal pieces.

Dunnes Stores is recalling Dunnes Stores 8 Plain Tortilla Wraps because of the possible presence of metal pieces.
